text.title: Design Tokens Worked Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example for the design-tokens methodology.

example.title: Dark-mode-ready button tokens
example.narrative: Brand has light + dark theme. Primitive: gray-50..gray-900, blue-50..blue-900. Semantic per theme: text/primary maps to gray-900 (light) and gray-50 (dark); surface/raised maps to gray-0 (light) and gray-800 (dark); action/primary maps to blue-600 (both). Component: button.primary.bg references action/primary; button.primary.text references gray-0. Style Dictionary emits CSS vars under [data-theme='light'] and [data-theme='dark']. Figma parity check passes after 3 iterations. Released as version 1.0.0.
example.artifact: tokens-spec.md + primitive.json + semantic.json + component.json + emitted platform files.
